statements.status_notes: kubectl 1.36.2 ships golang.org/x/net v0.49.0 (<v0.55.0), flagged for CVE-2026-39821. The reporter explicitly did NOT confirm that kubectl reaches the vulnerable x/net/idna code path, and maintainers made no reachability ruling in-issue (directed to the security guide). Reachability of the vulnerable code in kubectl is undetermined. [ref: https://github.com/kubernetes/kubernetes/issues/140092]
